title: RM-05E record real fix
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = '\n'
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'RM-05':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = '571ed3db3cb321889e9234e29a47d0c369cd7b12'
        task['runner_write_sha'] = '1c66d7c3758c8cd58416e49def58ae63f3357cad'
        task['validation_sha'] = '571ed3db3cb321889e9234e29a47d0c369cd7b12'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T14:55:59Z'
        task['audit_reopen_resolved'] = True
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T14:57:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS'
queue['next_action'] = 'await operator or Claude to add next tasks; do not invent tasks'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
lines = [
    json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T14:55:17Z','id':'RM-05D-WRITE','trace_id':'rm05d_real_runners_run_script_fix_repair','sha':'1c66d7c3758c8cd58416e49def58ae63f3357cad','status':'runner_files_written_but_status_task_failed_on_validation_exception','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False),
    json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T14:55:59Z','id':'RM-05D','trace_id':'rm05d_status_validation_repair','sha':'571ed3db3cb321889e9234e29a47d0c369cd7b12','status':'done','all_valid':True,'workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
]
for line in lines:
    if line not in existing:
        existing += line + NL
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/RM05E_RECORD_REAL_RUNNER_FIX_CLOSE_QUEUE.json')
state_obj = {'id':'RM-05E','trace_id':'rm05e_record_real_runner_fix_close_queue','status':'completed','release_pass':True,'recorded_step':'RM-05D','runner_write_sha':'1c66d7c3758c8cd58416e49def58ae63f3357cad','validation_sha':'571ed3db3cb321889e9234e29a47d0c369cd7b12','queue_state':'EMPTY_NO_PENDING_TASKS','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'ACTIVE_QUEUE empty; do not invent tasks'}
state.write_text(json.dumps(state_obj, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/RM05E_RECORD_REAL_RUNNER_FIX_CLOSE_QUEUE.md')
report_lines = ['# RM-05E | Record real runner fix and close queue', 'Status: completed', 'Date: 2026-06-04', '', 'RM-05D runner files were written in SHA 1c66d7c3758c8cd58416e49def58ae63f3357cad. RM-05D validation/status was completed in SHA 571ed3db3cb321889e9234e29a47d0c369cd7b12.', '', 'ACTIVE_QUEUE has no PENDING tasks. Workflow lock respected. No .github/workflows files touched.', '', 'Next: queue empty; do not invent tasks.']
